cases.prompt: Check my gcloud auth and ADC setup, something is off with BigQuery.

assertions.text: Diagnoses gcloud auth status and detects misconfiguration
Injects environment variables GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT and GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS
Provides a browser OAuth one-liner if re-authentication is needed

cases.prompt: Vertex AI 인증이 안 돼. gcloud 인증 상태 좀 봐줘.

assertions.text: Auto-fixes the ghost project issue as part of diagnosis
Stays silent when auth is already OK (auto-called by the simonK harness)
